utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check which of these are present and fully detailed in the final coverage plan. health_coverage is fully specified with physical and mental components, providers, policy numbers, coverage descriptions, and costs (✓). property_coverage is present with provider, policy number, detailed coverage (including wine collection), and costs (✓). travel_coverage is present with provider, policy number, coverage details, and costs (✓). additional_services is present with two sub-policies, each with policy number, coverage, and costs (✓). total_budget is present with monthly and annual totals, previous cost, and savings (✓). Thus all 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists the following key selections: (1) Physical health coverage from PrimeCare with policy number HC001 and comprehensive global executive healthcare — this corresponds to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. (2) Mental health coverage from PrimeCare with policy number HM001 — this maps to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. (3) Property coverage from EliteHome with policy number PR001 — this matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content. (4) Travel coverage from PrimeTravel with policy number TR001 — this corresponds to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. (5) Additional services include equipment protection and premium membership; equipment protection covering business and personal electronics aligns with 'Technology Protection' under property_enhancement_services, and premium membership aligns with 'Premium Insurance Membership' under general_services. Mapping each of these to their respective ratings yields: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) = 10, PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) = 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage = 10, PrimeTravel Premium Plan = 10, Technology Protection = 10, Premium Insurance Membership = 10.
